example_summary: The first enantioselective total synthesis of (–)-denticulatin A by W. Oppolzer featured a key enantioselective aldol reaction. A (Z)-borylenolate derived from an N-propionylbornane-10,2-sultam chiral auxiliary reacted with a meso dialdehyde, achieving enantiotopic group differentiation to afford the product in high yield and diastereoselectivity (20:1 dr).

extracts.transformation_text: Enantioselective aldol reaction using a bornanesultam chiral auxiliary for enantiotopic group differentiation in a meso dialdehyde.
extracts.conditions_text: i. Et2BOTf, i-Pr2NEt, DCM, -78 °C; ii. addition of meso dialdehyde
